testcase.name: verify_account_registration

testcase.name: setup

error.message: Unable to obtain: geckodriver, error Command failed with code: 65, executed: [--browser, firefox, --language-binding, java, --output, json] error sending request for url (https://ftp.mozilla.org/pub/firefox/releases/148.0.2/win64/en-US/Firefox%20Setup%20148.0.2.exe) Build info: version: '4.27.0', revision: 'd6e718d134' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.6' Driver info: driver.version: FirefoxDriver
